creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to jau from comment #2)
Thanks for the infos.

As I said before, your attachment only contains part of the whole build process ;)

But let us try another way:

As no one else complains about such a build problem with graphics/qgis, it is likely that you have a local deviation in your installed ports (unusual combination of ports options, ...).

Before any next step, please check if your ports system is up to date. Especially please rebuild and reinstall devel/py-qt5-core.

Can you show the full output of 'make configure' and the contents of the config.log file, please?
